debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
omega
  have h₂ : ¬ args[i] = 0 := h'
  have h₃ : ¬ args[i] = 1 := h''
  have h₄ : (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs).eval = .n := by
    have h₅ : (Exp.eval (args[i] * (1 - args[i]))) ≠ 0 := by
      have : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₆
        apply h₂
        simp_all
        <;>
        aesop
      have : (args[i] : ZMod p) ≠ 1 := by
        intro h₆
        apply h₃
        simp_all
        <;>
        aesop
      have h₆ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₆
        have h₇ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] = 0 := h₆
        have h₈ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
          have h₉ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] = 0 := h₇
          have h₁₀ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
            have h₁₁ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] = 0 := h₉
            have h₁₂ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
              apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
              simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h₁₁
            exact h₁₂
          exact h₁₀
        apply h₃
        simp_all
        <;>
        aesop
      have h₇ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - args[i]) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h₈
        have h₉ : (args[i] : ZMod p) * (1 - args[i]) = 0 := h₈
        have h₁₀ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 ∨ (1 - args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := by
          apply eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero h₉
        cases h₁₀ with
        | inl h₁₀ =>
          have h₁₁ : (args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := h₁₀
          apply h₂
          simp_all
          <;>
          aesop
        | inr h₁₀ =>
          have h₁₁ : (1 - args[i] : ZMod p) = 0 := h₁₀
          have h₁₂ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] = 0 := h₁₁
          have h₁₃ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
            have h₁₄ : (1 : ZMod p) - args[i] = 0 := h₁₂
            have h₁₅ : (1 : ZMod p) = args[i] := by
              apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
              simpa [sub_eq_zero] using h₁₄
            exact h₁₅
          apply h₃
          simp_all
          <;>
          aesop
      exact h₇
    simp [Cs.eval, assert_bit_e]
    <;> simp_all [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero]
    <;>
    (try cases p <;> simp_all [ZMod, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one])
    <;>
    (try contradiction)
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try omega)
  have h₅ : (Vector.foldl assert_bit_e cs args).eval = .n := by
    have h₆ : ∀ (v : Vector (ZMod p) ?m) (cs : Cs p (ZMod p)), (∀ (e : (ZMod p)), (assert_bit_e e cs).eval = .n) → (Vector.foldl assert_bit_e cs v).eval = .n := by
      intro v cs h
      induction' v with x xs ih
      · simp [Vector.foldl]
      · simp_all [Vector.foldl]
        <;>
        (try cases p <;> simp_all [ZMod, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [h, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval])
        <;>
        (try omega)
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
        <;>
        (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
        <;>
        (try omega)
    exact h₆ (Vector.map (fun _ => (1 : ZMod p)) args) cs (fun x => by simpa [h₄] using h₄)
  have h₆ : (assert_bits_e args cs).eval = .n := by
    have h₇ : (Vector.foldl assert_bit_e cs args).eval = .n := h₅
    have h₈ : (assert_bit_e (args[i]) cs).eval = .n := h₄
    simp_all [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl]
    <;>
    (try cases p <;> simp_all [ZMod, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [h₄, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval])
    <;>
    (try omega)
    <;>
    (try contradiction)
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try norm_num at * <;> simp_all [ZMod.nat_cast_self])
    <;>
    (try omega)
  exact h₆
